mapper.select: SELECT a.code FROM bus_route b JOIN airport a ON a.id = b.airport_id WHERE b.source_id = #{sourceId} AND b.deleted = 0 AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM airport WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0

SELECT a.code AS airportCode, a.name AS airportName, ci.name AS cityName, COALESCE(SUM(s.cnt), 0) AS views FROM airport_search_stat s JOIN airport a ON a.id = s.airport_id AND a.deleted = 0 JOIN city ci ON ci.id = a.city_id AND ci.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.day >= #{since} GROUP BY a.id, a.code, a.name, ci.name ORDER BY views DESC, a.code ASC LIMIT #{limit}
